title: Prioritization in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger prioritization in practice judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Prioritization in Practice is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Prioritization in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good prioritization in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Prioritization in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
